prompts.title: Concept Generator
prompts.description: Gera 4 variações de thumbnail IRL em grid 2x2 com regras de composição, luz e personagens.

options.label: Ultra realista
options.value: ultra-realistic, shot on Sony A7IV, 24mm lens, cinematic depth of field

options.label: Realista
options.value: realistic, DSLR quality, natural lighting, editorial feel

options.label: Over edited
options.value: over-edited, heavy color grading, high contrast, dramatic saturation, composited background

options.label: Stylized Realism
options.value: high-end cinematic digital painting in stylized realism

options.label: Variado (4 diferentes)
options.value: 4 distinctly different camera angles across the 4 cells

options.label: Ambiental (40%)
options.value: environmental portrait with subject taking up 40% of frame

options.label: Inclinado à frente
options.value: standing, arms slightly open, leaning forward

options.label: Agachado tenso
options.value: crouching low to the ground, intense

options.label: Reação exagerada
options.value: reacting with exaggerated expression, hands near face

options.label: Sério, olhar fixo
options.value: intense direct eye contact with camera, serious expression

options.label: Chocado
options.value: wide shocked expression, eyes open, mouth agape

options.label: Sorriso confiante
options.value: confident smirk, eyes locked on camera

fields.label: Descrição do fundo
fields.placeholder: ex: uma grande tubulação de óleo pelo mar ártico congelado, com gelo ao redor...

fields.label: Elemento principal da cena
fields.placeholder: ex: pipeline de óleo, caminhão, avião...

fields.label: Detalhes extras (opcional)
fields.placeholder: ex: névoa, detritos voando, reflexo no chão molhado...

options.label: Golden hour
options.value: golden hour natural sunlight, warm tones

options.label: Dramática lateral
options.value: hard dramatic side lighting, deep shadows

options.label: Neon / noturna
options.value: neon and artificial city lights at night

options.label: High-key
options.value: high-key flat lighting, bright and even

characterFields.label: Personagem / Ref.
characterFields.placeholder: ex: The Deep de The Boys...

secondaryPositions.label: Direita do Youtuber
secondaryPositions.value: standing beside the main subject on the right

secondaryPositions.label: Esquerda do Youtuber
secondaryPositions.value: standing beside the main subject on the left

secondaryPositions.label: Primeiro plano, parcialmente cortado
secondaryPositions.value: in the foreground, partially cut off by frame edge

secondaryPositions.label: De frente (confronto)
secondaryPositions.value: facing the main subject in confrontation

prompts.template:
Make 4 different and creative angle variations in the best composition from this scene, still showing the main subject human. Human needs to look at the camera. Create all 4 in the same {{art}}, arranged in a 2x2 grid in a single image.

YouTube thumbnail concept, {{num_chars_word}} person, {{style}}.

CHARACTERS:
{{characters}}

EYE CONTACT RULE: The Youtuber's eyes are ALWAYS directed straight into the camera lens in every single panel, regardless of head angle or body direction. This rule is absolute and cannot be broken.

RULE OF THIRDS (critical, applied to every cell): Mentally divide each frame into a 3x3 grid of 9 equal sections using 2 vertical and 2 horizontal lines. All key compositional elements must be deliberately placed on or near these lines and their 4 intersection points (power points). The character's eyes must land on or within the top horizontal third line. The character's body must be anchored to either the left or right vertical third, never dead center. The primary environmental element must occupy the opposite vertical third from the character. The horizon line must align with either the top or bottom horizontal third, never the middle. No important element should be placed in the exact center of the frame.

SETTING: {{background}}.{{scene_detail_block}}

GLOBAL LIGHT SOURCE: {{light_type}} coming from the {{light_pos}} of each frame — {{key_color}} tones hitting the character's face and suit as the key light, creating strong specularity on the suit material. The opposite side of the character falls into cool shadow, creating contrast that reinforces the environment. A subtle {{rim_color}} rim light from the rear separates the character from the background. This light setup is consistent across all 4 cells, adapted to the geometry of each angle.

SPACE DIVISION RULE (critical): The main subject and the key environmental elements ({{main_prop}}) must always share the frame as equals. The character should never fully cover, overlap, or obstruct the primary scene elements. Both the character AND the environment must be clearly readable at the same time — treat them as two co-protagonists of the composition. The character is placed to the side, in front of, or angled away from the main prop so that both are fully visible. The only acceptable exception is when the pose physically requires partial overlap (such as pointing at or interacting with the object directly).

CAMERA & COMPOSITION: {{framing}}, {{cam_angle}}. Each of the 4 variations must use a distinctly different camera angle, framing and body pose while respecting all rules above.

COMPOSITION RULES (applied to all 4 cells): No dead space — every inch filled with subject or contextual environment. No text, no speech bubbles, no graphic overlays. No letterboxing, no empty corners. Each cell is a complete standalone 16:9 thumbnail composition.

TECHNICAL: Single image with 2x2 grid layout, no borders or separators between cells, each cell 16:9 ratio.

prompts.title: Relight
prompts.description: Aplica nova iluminação em imagem existente usando lógica IC-Light. Controle direção, tipo e intensidade da luz.

options.label: Esquerda → Direita
options.value: left side, traveling left to right across the scene

options.label: Direita → Esquerda
options.value: right side, traveling right to left across the scene

options.label: Superior esquerdo
options.value: upper-left, diagonal downward across the scene

options.label: Superior direito
options.value: upper-right, diagonal downward across the scene

options.label: Inferior esquerdo
options.value: lower-left, traveling upward across the scene

options.label: Frontal
options.value: directly in front of the subject, flat front-lit

options.label: Atrás (backlit)
options.value: directly behind the subject, backlit silhouette

options.label: Luz solar dura
options.value: hard sunlight, sharp shadow edges, high contrast

options.label: Estúdio suave
options.value: soft studio light, diffused and even, gentle shadow edges

options.label: Overcast difuso
options.value: overcast diffused daylight, no hard shadows, even fill

options.label: Neon
options.value: neon artificial light, colored glow, soft falloff

options.label: Vela / fogo
options.value: candlelight or fire, warm flickering, very soft falloff

options.label: Golden hour
options.value: golden hour sunlight, warm raking light, long soft shadows

options.label: Sutil
options.value: subtle fill — barely noticeable, very low intensity

options.label: Médio
options.value: medium fill — present and visible but not overpowering, no blown-out highlights

options.label: Forte
options.value: strong dramatic — high intensity, deep shadows, bold highlights

options.label: High-key
options.value: blown-out high-key — maximum brightness, minimal shadows

options.label: Branco neutro
options.value: neutral white, slightly cool — clean and cinematic, not warm

options.label: Frio azulado
options.value: cool blue-white, moonlight or overcast tone

prompts.template:
Relight this image using IC-Light logic. Do not alter the composition, facial features, outfit, or any structural element of the image. Only modify the lighting.

LIGHT SOURCE:
- Direction: {{light_direction}}
- Type: {{light_type}}
- Intensity: {{intensity}}

KEY LIGHT BEHAVIOR:
- The key light enters from {{light_direction}}, casting visible shadows consistently opposite to the source
- Shadow edge quality matches the source type: hard sources produce sharp edges, soft sources produce diffused gradual transitions
- Specularity appears on all surfaces facing the light source — skin highlights, fabric sheen, reflective materials respond accordingly

SHADOW BEHAVIOR:
- Cast shadows fall consistently in the direction opposite to the light source
- Shadow density matches light intensity
- Maintain ambient occlusion in creases, under chin, under arms, between folds
- Do not leave shadow areas as pure black — fill with a subtle complementary tone

{{scope_block}}

COLOR & TEMPERATURE:
- Key light color: {{key_color}}
- Fill/shadow color: soft neutral or complementary cool tone in shadow areas, no pure black
- Rim light: {{rim_color}}{{rim_block}}

PRESERVATION RULES:
- Do not change facial structure, expressions, or eye direction
- Do not change outfit colors beyond what the new lighting naturally tints them
- Do not add or remove any object from the scene
- Do not alter the composition or crop
- Maintain the original image's art style and render quality
